title: huperzia × helleri
intro: Huperzia × helleri, also known as Helleboric acid or Huperzine A-rich plant, is a hybrid species of the Huperzia genus, a type of club moss. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit acetylcholinesterase, an enzyme that breaks down the neurotransmitter acetylcholine, which is involved in memory and learning. The health benefits of Huperzia × helleri include its potential to improve cognitive function, memory, and neuroprotective effects, making it a subject of interest in the study of neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Huperzia × helleri is typically prepared as a herbal extract or capsule, and is often used as a dietary supplement to support brain health.
